SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, May 13, 2015 in Department 525:
Christopher Pacheco and Mary Ann Ching, Respondents/Plaintiffs appear as propria Persona.
No appearance by Appellant/Defendant Tony Anthony Sladek.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Respondents/Plaintiffs are sworn. Christopher Pacheco and Mary Ann Ching testify on their own behalf. The matter is submitted.

Judge David Yang; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
